supervisor.reason: The supervisor now runs a final verification gate, emits a recommended resume phase on failure, and the supporting workflow guidance plus regression coverage are aligned.

bootstrap.goal: Extend the supervisor workflow with a final verification gate that can route failed work back through development.

tasks.resume_checkpoint: Implementation and targeted validation are complete. Resume from commit preparation unless a follow-up asks to deepen the final verification mechanism.

items.text: Phase 1. Add a final verification stage to the supervisor workflow and state model before commit preparation
Phase 2. Teach supervisor reports and continuation prompts to identify the root cause of final verification failures and recommend the return phase
Phase 3. Update workflow guidance plus regression coverage for the new final verification loop

next_action: Await direction on whether to prepare a commit for the supervisor final-verification enhancement.
notes: Treat this file as machine truth and keep Markdown synchronized.
DASHBOARD.md should show the actual progress of the active scope.
PLAN.md should list prompt-derived development items in `[ ] Phase N. <title>` format.
The installed guidance bundle and packaged asset copy should stay synchronized.
Legacy TASKS.md snapshots should be migrated forward into PLAN.md without losing checklist state.
Final verification now sits between `test_and_review` and `commit` in the allowed workflow sequence.
Supervisor rework reports now recommend the phase that should resume next, defaulting implementation problems back to `develop`.
Validation completed successfully for tests.test_supervisor, tests.test_loop_runner, and tests.test_state_repository.
